CME_Requirements: Completion of 2 hours of CME per month
Attendance at 2 seminars of CME per year

Continuing_Medical_Education: Completion of 2 hours of CME per month
Attendance at 2 seminars of CME per year
Crew_Insurance: Up to $250,000 coverage for medical and liability costs for staff
Malpractice_Insurance: Up to $1 million coverage for malpractice liability costs

Travel_Reimbursement.Eligibility_Criteria: Willingness to travel more than 25 miles from the provider's primary office location, with advanced written notice from the employer

Eligibility_Criteria: Must be licensed to practice medicine in the jurisdiction
Cannot compete within 50 miles of employer address

Obligations: Provider must keep employer information confidential and not use it for personal gain
Provider must not recruit away any of the employer's employees, subcontractors, customers, or clients

Conditions: Termination can only be done with 30 days written notice by either party
Obligations: Provider must return all property and information to the employer upon termination

Process: Any disputes between the parties must be resolved through binding arbitration

Applicable: The contract, and any disputes between the parties, will be governed by the laws of the state in which the employer is located
